concerns.text: T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan (code/, data/, tests/, state/)' is too coarse. Does not name specific files to create. Atomizer will need to split into individual file-creation tasks.
T003 'Configure linting (flake8) and formatting (black) tools' lacks concrete deliverable. Which config files? Where? How verified? Needs specific file paths and verification criteria.
T004 'Setup data schema contracts in contracts/' is vague. What format (JSON Schema, Pydantic, etc.)? Which exact files? How is completion verified?
T006 'Setup environment configuration management in code/config.py' lacks specificity. What config fields? What format? How verified?
T007 'Create base data models/entities in code/data_models.py' is too vague. Which entities? What fields? How verified against spec entities (IonSolventPair, BornPrediction, ResidualAnalysis)?
T008 'Configure error handling and logging infrastructure in code/utils/logging.py' lacks concrete deliverable. What logging format? What error handling patterns? How verified?
T009 'Setup state checksumming framework' is vague. What framework? What files get checksummed? How is the framework verified to work?
T028 'Ensure computation completes in <10 minutes on 2 CPU cores' lacks verification method. No test script or benchmark task specified. How is this measured?
T039 'Code cleanup and refactoring across code/' is too vague. What cleanup criteria? How verified? This is a catch-all that should be split or removed.
T040 'Performance optimization across all scripts' lacks concrete deliverable. What metrics? What targets? How verified?
T041 'Additional unit tests in tests/unit/' is too vague. Which tests? How many? What coverage target? Atomizer will need to split.
T042 'Security hardening (dependency scanning)' lacks concrete deliverable. Which tool? What scan command? How verified?
T043 'Run quickstart.md validation' is vague. What validation steps? What success criteria? How verified?

Constitution Principle I requires random seeds pinned in code/ for reproducibility, but no task explicitly implements this. T005 only covers physical constants, not seed pinning in born_calculator.py and regression_analysis.py.
Constitution Principle V requires content hashes on every artifact, but T009 only sets up the checksumming framework without explicitly enforcing hash generation across all data/code artifacts.
Constitution Principle VII requires p-value failures to be explicitly flagged in the paper as limitations, but T036 only saves regression results to CSV without ensuring paper documentation.
